title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: the easiest way to get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same capabilities as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package offering Ollama LLM, embedder and retriever components.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-ui)
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; runs entirely in browser, no backend code.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & persistence options.

title: ollama-compose
summary: Ready-to-use Docker Compose stacks bundling Ollama with Open WebUI, Postgres, QDrant, etc.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + LangChain + Chroma to chat with PDFs.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Lightweight Next.js chatbot template that proxies to a local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that adds a private Copilot powered by any Ollama model.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama with Kotlin extensions; sync/async, streaming, POJO mapping.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for Ollama with syntax highlighting, history, and keybindings.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI (Tauri + React) for chatting with Ollama models offline.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community .NET SDK for Ollama with strong naming, NuGet packages, and ASP.NET Core samples.

title: ollama-dbee
summary: DBeaver plugin that adds SQL query generation and explanation using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to integrate Ollama chat, completion, and embedding steps into workflows.

title: ollama-go
summary: Idiomatic Go client for Ollama with context support, retries, and code-gen from OpenAPI.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit app template for chatting with Ollama models, including voice input via browser.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you summarize notes, brainstorm, and Q&A using local Ollama models.
